title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Chiffon, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Bege as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But who in the world is that huge-faced guy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: bege's ships are heading your way, towards cacao Island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're on his tail in our battleships right now! We should be able to corner him at the harbor!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahaha! And here I thought he was a bit more cool- headed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I guess he's come for you, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Perfect timing. Put me on the loudspeaker.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: CACAD island, in front of the harbor

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm faithful to the letter of the law!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sister though she may be, I will not hesitate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: moor at the harbor, come ashore, and surrender.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: any funny business, and that'll be her end.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, there, there! We'll save Mama for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We're heading over to the harbor

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: bege! Take everyone and just get out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It was my decision to come here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you get caught, you'll all be executed anyway! Save yourselves, at least!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: you guys were my only real family!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just promise me you'll one day get revenge on my behalf!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Madam! How can you say such a thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We'll be at the harbor soon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We'll come ashore as you said.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't raise your hand against Chiffon any more.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
